site.description: Free photography tools: FOV simulator, Color scheme generator, EXIF viewer, Crop and frame photos, and more.

fov-simulator.title: FOV Simulator — Compare Focal Lengths
fov-simulator.description: Compare field of view across different focal lengths and sensor sizes. Free, interactive, shareable.

dof-calculator.title: Depth of Field Calculator
dof-calculator.description: Calculate depth of field for any lens, aperture, and sensor size. See near/far focus limits, hyperfocal distance, and background blur — free and interactive.

exposure-simulator.title: Exposure Triangle Simulator
exposure-simulator.description: Interactive exposure triangle simulator — see how aperture, shutter speed, and ISO affect your image in real time with live preview.

star-trail-calculator.title: Star Trail Calculator
star-trail-calculator.description: Calculate the maximum exposure time for pinpoint stars using the 500, NPF, and other rules. Plan star trail stacking shots for any location.

white-balance-visualizer.title: White Balance Visualizer
white-balance-visualizer.description: See how white balance and color temperature affect your photos. Visualize changes from 2000K to 10000K with real-time preview.

sensor-size-comparison.title: Sensor Size Comparison
sensor-size-comparison.description: Compare camera sensor sizes from medium format to smartphone. See overlay, side-by-side, and pixel density views with real camera models.

color-scheme-generator.title: Color Scheme Generator
color-scheme-generator.description: Generate color palettes for photography using complementary, analogous, triadic, and tetradic color harmonies. Interactive color wheel with photo picker.

frame-studio.title: Frame Studio
frame-studio.description: Crop, frame, and compose photos with grid overlays. 100% client-side — your photos never leave your device.

exif-viewer.title: EXIF Viewer
exif-viewer.description: View EXIF metadata, histogram, and image preview for any photo. 100% client-side — your photos never leave your device.

hyperfocal-simulator.title: Hyperfocal Distance Simulator
hyperfocal-simulator.description: Visualize hyperfocal distance for any lens and sensor. See exactly where to focus for maximum sharpness from foreground to infinity.

shutter-speed-visualizer.title: Shutter Speed Visualizer
shutter-speed-visualizer.description: Find the minimum shutter speed for sharp handheld photos. Accounts for focal length, sensor size, and image stabilization.

nd-filter-calculator.title: ND Filter Calculator
nd-filter-calculator.description: Calculate the correct shutter speed when using ND filters. Supports any filter strength from ND2 to ND1000000 with a quick-reference table.

perspective-compression-simulator.title: Perspective Compression Simulator
perspective-compression-simulator.description: Interactive 3D simulator showing how focal length and distance affect perspective compression. See background compression change in real time.

about.title: About
about.description: PhotoTools is a free collection of browser-based photography calculators, simulators, and references for photographers of all skill levels.

contact.title: Contact | PhotoTools
contact.description: Get in touch with the PhotoTools team — questions, feedback, or suggestions about our photography tools.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy | PhotoTools
privacy.description: Learn how PhotoTools handles your data, including analytics, cookies, and contact form submissions at www.phototools.io.

terms.title: Terms of Service | PhotoTools
terms.description: Terms of Service for PhotoTools — learn about acceptable use, intellectual property, disclaimers, and limitations of liability for www.phototools.io.

glossary.title: Photography Glossary
glossary.description: Searchable glossary of 50+ photography terms with definitions and links to interactive tools.
